title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Axe India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Axe India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axe India International Enterprises! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axe India International Enterprises:
Axe India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India International Enterprises!
